    SampleSales — Business User Guide

    Business users · generated TIMESTAMP

    2
    Pages
    7
    Glossary Terms

    1. Introduction

    Welcome! This guide explains how to use the 'SampleSales' report — no technical background needed. 'SampleSales' reports on Sales, tracking Avg Order Value, Total Revenue, Revenue YTD across Customer, Date. It spans 2 report page(s), documented individually below. This purpose statement is derived from the model contents alone — the business context requires confirmation from the report owner.

    2. Getting Started

    • Start on the 'Sales Overview' page for an overview.
    • Use the filters at the top of each page to focus on what matters to you.
    • Right-click any data point to see more options, including drill-through where available.

    3. Report Pages

    Sales Overview

    Presents 3 visual(s) — 1 column chart, 1 slicer, 1 decomposition tree. Key fields: Year, Total Revenue, Date, Region, Segment.

    What to look at: Total Revenue

    VisualWhat it shows
    Revenue by YearShows Total Revenue broken down by Year.
    Revenue BreakdownA decomposition tree breaks a measure down one field at a time. Click the + on a node and pick a field to expand by; the tree shows which categories contribute most to the total.

    Filters on this page: Date.

    How to navigate this page

    • Use the 'Date' filter to narrow down what you see on this page.
    • Click on any chart to highlight the related data across the rest of the page.

    Questions this page answers

    • How has Total Revenue trended by Year?
    • How does Total Revenue compare across Region?

    Drilling into detail

    • Right-click a data point and choose Drill through to open 'Region Detail' for more detail.

    Region Detail

    Presents 1 visual(s) — 1 map. Key fields: Region, Total Revenue. Drill-through detail page reached from other pages.

    What to look at: Total Revenue

    VisualWhat it shows
    Revenue by RegionA map plots values geographically. Bubble size or colour encodes the measure — compare regions visually and zoom for detail.

    Questions this page answers

    • How does Total Revenue compare across Region?

    4. Glossary of Business Terms

    TermWhat it means
    Avg Order ValueA ratio: Total Revenue divided by the number of unique SalesKey values.
    Total RevenueComputes the total of Quantity * UnitPrice, evaluated row by row over FILTER ( Sales, Status <> "Canceled" ).
    Revenue YTDA time-intelligence calculation: the year-to-date value of Total Revenue.
    YearA time period used to filter and compare data across days, months, or years.
    DateA time period used to filter and compare data across days, months, or years.
    RegionA geographic area used to compare performance across locations.
    SegmentA grouping used to compare different kinds of records.
